room.caption: [Vault12] I was definitely thankful for the help. The Gate maps were a large portion of the maps up to Gate 6.

instance.creationCode: vaultString=" Anger, hatred, spite... even I feel these."
zoneColor=1 y+=2 image_xscale=96; image_yscale=62 moveSpd=1; moveDelay=64
